CREATE TABLE xml_test (id INT, data XML);
SELECT xml_cut(data, '/root/a/b') FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xml_cut(data, '/root') FROM xml_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT xml_cut(data, '/root/a') AS cut_a FROM xml_test WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT xml_cut(data, '@id') FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xml_cut(data, '/root/a/b[1]') FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1;
WITH cut_data AS (SELECT xml_cut(data, '/root/a') AS cut_xml FROM xml_test) SELECT cut_xml FROM cut_data;
CREATE TABLE xml_entities (entity_name VARCHAR(255), entity_data XML);
SELECT xml_cut(entity_data, '/root/C') FROM xml_entities WHERE entity_name = 'entity1';
SELECT xml_cut(data, '/root/a') FROM xml_test WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM xml_test);
SELECT xml_cut(data, '/root/a/b') AS cut_b_data FROM xml_test WHERE EXTRACTVALUE(data, '/root/a/b') = 'C';
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id INT, nested_data XML);
SELECT xml_cut(nested_data, '/outer/inner') FROM nested_test WHERE id = 1;
